title: 17-14 Election to Deem Supplies to be Financial Services and Related Election for Selected Listed Financial Institutions - Canada.ca

## 17-14 Election to Deem Supplies to be Financial Services and Related Election for Selected Listed Financial Institutions

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .
